title: Bottom Panel Output
description: Studio UI for **Bottom Panel Output**: the full stream of user-visible action results (saves, validation summary lines, scope edits, etc.), backed by a local Studio session buffer rather than a dedicated API route. In [`ui:shell-layout`](../shell-layout/spec.md) this is the **first** bottom tab and the **default** on Studio mount.
context: Studio UI for **Bottom Panel Output**: the full stream of user-visible action results (saves, validation summary lines, scope edits, etc.), backed by a local Studio session buffer rather than a dedicated API route. In [`ui:shell-layout`](../shell-layout/spec.md) this is the **first** bottom tab and the **default** on Studio mount.

rules.requirement: Output is the leading bottom tab
rules: The shell MUST render **Output** as the leftmost bottom tab and MUST select it when the shell first mounts unless the user previously chose another tab in the same session (v1: in-memory React state only).

rules.requirement: Output lists all local session output entries
rules: The panel MUST show every local output line (all levels), newest first, from the in-memory session buffer.

rules.requirement: shell appends local output on successful actions
rules: When the shell handles successful description save, invalidation policy save, scope dialog save, artifact save, validate, restore/discard, or open navigation, it MUST append a local output entry with an appropriate `level` and `action`. It MAY `appendProjectLog` at `debug` with the **action id** as the log message and the user-facing text in `context` only (MUST NOT duplicate the full output line as the log message). Validation with findings MAY select the **Problems** tab; other actions SHOULD select **Output**.
The local output buffer MUST cap retained entries at 400 lines. When appending beyond that limit, the oldest entries MUST be discarded first.
When the stream is empty, the panel MUST show: *Results of saves, validation, and other studio actions appear here.*

rules.requirement: view uses local output state and port hooks only
rules: Components MUST consume output data through local shell state plus `SpecdDataPort` hooks for remote logs only, and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.
Local output rendering MUST update immediately after append without waiting for remote polling. Remote log failures MUST NOT block rendering existing local output entries.

scenarios.requirement: Output is the leading bottom tab
scenarios.name: Output is first tab and default on mount
then: Output is the leftmost bottom tab

scenarios.requirement: Output lists all local session output entries
scenarios.name: Output panel shows user-facing messages
when: shell appends a local output entry after a save
then: output panel lists the message immediately

scenarios.requirement: shell appends local output on successful actions
scenarios.name: Description save selects Output tab
given: user saved change description from Overview
then: AND a local output line mentions updated description

scenarios.requirement: shell appends local output on successful actions
scenarios.name: Validate appends lines with levels
when: validation completes with failures and warnings
then: each result line is appended to local output
AND failures use level error and warnings use level warn

scenarios.name: Oldest entries are dropped beyond the cap
given: the local output buffer already contains 400 entries
when: a new output entry is appended
then: AND the oldest prior entry is removed

scenarios.name: Empty output shows action-results placeholder
then: placeholder describes saves and studio actions
AND does not claim to be the validation-only panel

scenarios.requirement: view uses local output state and port hooks only
scenarios.name: Output rendering does not depend on remote studio-output fetch
then: it reads from local shell-managed output state
AND remote SpecdDataPort access is reserved for project logs/traces

scenarios.name: Remote log failure does not clear existing output entries
when: a debug trace write or log read fails remotely
then: already-buffered local output entries remain visible
